> [!IMPORTANT]
> **This is NOT a complete list of games supported by OptiScaler.**  
>
> OptiScaler is compatible with most games that support DLSS 2+, FSR2+ or XeSS.                                                              
> FSR4 injection is working unless stated otherwise.                                                                                        
> The list below includes tested games, configuration options and reported issues with possible workarounds shared by our community members.  
>  
> _**`Click the blue game name to open its compatibility entry!`**_

> [!NOTE]
> For **Luma/Luma UE mods**, check [Luma Unreal Engine](#luma-unreal-engine) 
>   
> For **compatibility with other mods** (Reshade, SpecialK), check [this entry](https://github.com/optiscaler/OptiScaler/wiki/Compatibility-with-other-mods-(Reshade,-SpecialK))
>  
> For **general FSR4 info**, check [FSR4 Compatibility List](FSR4-Compatibility-List)  

## Editing the Compatibility list 
When adding a game – please add _**game name**_, working or not working _**checkmark**_, _**inputs used**_, any _**note**_ regarding what you used, and a _**game screenshot**_ with the open Opti overlay (convert to jpeg to save bandwidth)  
${{\color{orangered}\{\textsf{Before saving the page, please add a message for the changelog at the bottom if adding a new game or screenshot. \}}}}\$

> [!WARNING]
> _Avoid using: or ™ and similar in names for new game pages!_

### [Template](CL-Template) for detailed compatibility entries
* _Create a new page and hyperlink it to the game name in the table below_

> [!TIP]  
> :muscle: **Working** — **670**  
> * :boom: **Working on a single OS** — **2**  
>
> :key: **[OptiPatcher](https://github.com/optiscaler/OptiPatcher) Supported** — **184**  
> 
> :skull: **Not working** — **3**  
> 
> _**ATM the only games not working are Anti-Cheat enabled, with some exceptions.**_  
> 
> _Last updated – 29 June 2026_

## Luma Unreal Engine

Separate compatibility table for the pretty cool **Luma Framework** _generic mod that replaces default UE4/UE5 TAA implementation with DLSS (DLAA) or FSR3.  
At the moment it requires **DX11**._
* [Github page](https://github.com/Filoppi/Luma-Framework/wiki#unreal-engine)
* **It's important to check their UE compatibility list as it mentions additional requirements per every tested game** - _adding commands to Engine.ini, requiring specific in-game AA settings etc._

>[!NOTE]
> _**RECOMMENDED install method**_ for Luma combo with OptiScaler - [Luma Compatibility Entry](Luma-Unreal-Engine-Luma-UE)  
>  
> _**Click the game name** to open the Compatibility Entry with info on how to set up Luma UE with Opti!_ 

* _Already autoapplied since OptiScaler 0.9 builds, but Luma required DontUseNTShared=true, otherwise it would crash on switching to w/DX12 upscalers_
